state.next-action:
Session 2026-04-16c END. 7 commits, 18 decisions (gad-207..224). Phase 46 complete (site redesign 25→9 routes, CLI consolidation, SpriteAnimation, salvage pipeline). Extended: eval→species rename, species tracking schema, pressure v3 (latent entropy), gad spawn/play/generate text, VCS test species.
NEXT SESSION — three tracks with stopping points:
TRACK 1 (site rebrand): Use frontend web design skill + VCS skill. Rebrand landing site with new vocabulary. Explore alternative UX — panels may be too noisy, test bare data-attributes vs component wrappers (decision gad-223). STOP after: nav + home page rebrand passes build.
TRACK 2 (VCS portability): Run `gad spawn escape-the-dungeon/vcs-test`. Observe what agent builds in KAPLAY canvas. Compare bare data-attributes vs React component approach. Iterate VCS skill based on results. STOP after: one generation complete + skill iterated.
TRACK 3 (breed command + formula): Implement `gad breed` (merge two species configs, shed redundancy). Refine pressure formula display on site. STOP after: breed works + formula visible on /how-it-works.
TODOS (8): vcs-video-and-primitives, vcs-primitives-redesign, gad-generate-commands, desktop-client-and-skill-authoring, decentralized-auto-contributor, context-framework-builder-project, site-content-gaps, species-tracking-and-showcase.
